events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a confined space that is in-service, with steady readings, no abnormal sound or heat, maintenance log shows standard functional check completed with no open punch notes. Reference: OSHA 1910.146 (permit-required confined spaces).

This seems like a pass situation - no faults detected, everything checks out. The confined space is operating normally with no issues identified.
